services.name: OptimEngine

# Returns 402 with payment info: 100000 USDC micro-units

services.name: bobeu/agentpay-stream
services.description: AgentPay Stream is a decentralized, peer-to-peer subscription and micro-streaming payment platform built on Movement L1. This project enables real-time, per-second/per-unit payments for digital goods, data streams, and AI agent services using the cutting-edge x402 payment rail.
services.llm_usage_prompt: To use bobeu/agentpay-stream, call https://agentpay-stream.vercel.app with x402 payment of 0.001 USDC. Send json input. Returns json.
